freelance.title: Freelance Developer
freelance.description: Working as a freelance web developer for websites and web applications using HTML/CSS/JS, React/Next.js, and WordPress. Recently, I have been integrating AI tools and LLM APIs to accelerate development and enhance functionality. My AI-assisted development environment includes VS Code with GitHub Copilot and Cline extensions, as well as Cursor as an AI-first IDE.

vicon.title: VICON Web Business
vicon.description: Responsible for creating high-quality client websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Developed responsive themes/templates based on Contao Content Management System and managed backends, including database and server integration.

andersBjork.title: Anders Björk GmbH
andersBjork.description: Focused on developing responsive WordPress themes with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP. Conducted ongoing monitoring and performance optimization of live WordPress sites to ensure a positive user experience, along with maintaining and enhancing existing themes.

eTailersIss.title: eTailers ISS GmbH
eTailersIss.description: Development and maintenance of websites using HTML and CSS. Implementation and adaptation of websites including templates and features using JavaScript.

parrotMedia.title: Parrot Media GmbH
parrotMedia.description: Implementation of client websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Contribution to TYPO3 projects (template and layout adjustments), including testing and bug fixes.
